metadata.description: Resource group location. Defaults to the resource group's region so the "Deploy to Azure" button deploys where you have quota/capacity. deploy.ps1 sets this explicitly from the bicepparam file.
Admin password for all VMs (also used for the domain admin / test accounts). 12+ chars; must meet Azure Windows complexity: 3 of upper/lower/digit/symbol.
Domain Controller VM size. Defaults to a broadly-available burstable (B-series) size for the one-click button; deploy.ps1 uses a compute-optimized size from the bicepparam file.
Custom image resource ID for DC VM (overrides marketplace image when set). Must be a Windows image.
Driver computer VM size. Defaults to a broadly-available burstable (B-series) size for the one-click button.
SUT computer VM size. Defaults to a broadly-available burstable (B-series) size for the one-click button.
Driver computer Linux OS version (Ubuntu SKU)
Custom image resource ID for driver VM (overrides marketplace image when set)
Custom image resource ID for SUT VM (overrides marketplace image when set). Must be a Windows image.
Azure Bastion subnet address prefix (must be /26 or larger)

URL to the Domain DSC package zip (contains DSC/ folder, Config.json, Tools.json). Defaults to the public GitHub Release asset that the "Deploy to Azure" button consumes; the on-VM Custom Script Extension injects the real admin password into the package's placeholder Config.json at deploy time. deploy.ps1 overrides this with a freshly built, credential-baked package.

Enable Azure Disk Encryption (creates a Key Vault for encryption keys). Defaults OFF for the one-click button: ADE is applied by deploy.ps1 as a post-deploy step (which the Portal button cannot run), so for the button the vault would be created but never used. Managed disks are platform-encrypted at rest regardless. deploy.ps1 sets this true via the bicepparam file.
Environment name prefix (used for unique Key Vault naming)
Enable Azure Disk Encryption (creates a Key Vault for encryption keys)
Azure Bastion subnet address prefix (must be /26 or larger)
Custom image resource ID for DC VM (overrides marketplace image when set). Must be a Windows image.
URL to Domain-Package.zip file in Azure Storage

protectedSettings.commandToExecute: [format('powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -Command "Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -Force; Start-Transcript -Path C:\dc-extension-setup.log -Append; Write-Output \"Starting Domain Controller Setup...\"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path C:\Domain-Package -Force; $zipFile = Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter *.zip | Select-Object -First 1; if ($zipFile) {{ Write-Output \"Extracting $($zipFile.Name)...\"; Expand-Archive -Path $zipFile.FullName -DestinationPath C:\Domain-Package -Force; Write-Output \"Package extracted successfully\"; Remove-Item $zipFile.FullName -Force; }} else {{ Write-Output \"No zip file found\"; exit 1; }}; Write-Output \"Injecting credential into Config.json...\"; if (Test-Path C:\Domain-Package\DSC\Scripts\Set-ConfigCredential.ps1) {{ & C:\Domain-Package\DSC\Scripts\Set-ConfigCredential.ps1 -PasswordBase64 \"{0}\"; }}; Write-Output \"Starting Deploy-DC.ps1 (DSC + imperative)...\"; if (Test-Path C:\Domain-Package\DSC\Deploy-DC.ps1) {{ Set-Location C:\Domain-Package\DSC; .\Deploy-DC.ps1 -WorkingPath C:\Domain-Package; }} else {{ Write-Output \"Deploy-DC.ps1 not found, skipping configuration\"; }}; Write-Output \"Domain Controller extension setup completed\"; Stop-Transcript"', base64(parameters('adminPassword')))]

metadata.description: Driver computer Linux OS version (Ubuntu SKU)
Custom image resource ID for driver VM (overrides marketplace image when set)
Custom image resource ID for SUT VM (overrides marketplace image when set). Must be a Windows image.
URL to Domain-Package.zip file in Azure Storage

variables.driverImageRef: [if(not(empty(parameters('driverCustomImageId'))), createObject('id', parameters('driverCustomImageId')), if(variables('driverIsLinux'), createObject('publisher', 'Canonical', 'offer', 'ubuntu-24_04-lts', 'sku', parameters('driverLinuxOsVersion'), 'version', 'latest'), createObject('publisher', 'MicrosoftWindowsDesktop', 'offer', variables('driverWindowsOffer'), 'sku', parameters('driverOsVersion'), 'version', 'latest')))]

osProfile.windowsConfiguration: [if(variables('driverIsLinux'), null(), createObject('enableAutomaticUpdates', false(), 'provisionVMAgent', true(), 'winRM', createObject('listeners', createArray(createObject('protocol', 'Http'))), 'patchSettings', createObject('patchMode', 'Manual', 'assessmentMode', 'ImageDefault'), 'additionalUnattendContent', createArray(createObject('passName', 'OobeSystem', 'componentName', 'Microsoft-Windows-Shell-Setup', 'settingName', 'AutoLogon', 'content', format('<AutoLogon><Username>{0}</Username><Password><Value>{1}</Value><PlainText>true</PlainText></Password><Enabled>true</Enabled></AutoLogon>', parameters('adminUsername'), parameters('adminPassword'))))))]

protectedSettings.commandToExecute: [format('powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -Command "Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -Force; Start-Transcript -Path C:\domain-driver-setup.log -Append; Write-Output \"Starting Domain Driver Setup...\"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path C:\Domain-Package -Force; Write-Output \"Waiting for DNS resolution of {0} (member DNS is the DC, which may still be promoting)...\"; $dns = $false; for ($i = 0; $i -lt 60; $i++) {{ try {{ Resolve-DnsName -Name \"{1}\" -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; $dns = $true; break }} catch {{ Start-Sleep -Seconds 30 }} }}; if (-not $dns) {{ Write-Output \"DNS resolution of {2} failed after retries\"; exit 1 }}; $zip = \"C:\Domain-Package.zip\"; $dl = $false; for ($i = 0; $i -lt 10; $i++) {{ try {{ Start-BitsTransfer -Source \"{3}\" -Destination $zip -ErrorAction Stop; $dl = $true; break }} catch {{ Write-Output \"Download attempt failed: $($_.Exception.Message)\"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 30 }} }}; if (-not $dl) {{ Write-Output \"Package download failed\"; exit 1 }}; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath C:\Domain-Package -Force; Remove-Item $zip -Force; Write-Output \"Injecting credential into Config.json...\"; if (Test-Path C:\Domain-Package\DSC\Scripts\Set-ConfigCredential.ps1) {{ & C:\Domain-Package\DSC\Scripts\Set-ConfigCredential.ps1 -PasswordBase64 \"{4}\"; }}; Write-Output \"Starting Deploy-Driver.ps1 (DSC + imperative)...\"; if (Test-Path C:\Domain-Package\DSC\Deploy-Driver.ps1) {{ Set-Location C:\Domain-Package\DSC; .\Deploy-Driver.ps1 -WorkingPath C:\Domain-Package; }} else {{ Write-Output \"Deploy-Driver.ps1 not found, skipping configuration\"; }}; Write-Output \"Driver configuration completed\"; Stop-Transcript"', variables('packageHost'), variables('packageHost'), variables('packageHost'), parameters('domainPackageZipUrl'), base64(parameters('adminPassword')))]

[format('bash -c "set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; echo Starting Domain Driver Setup...; mkdir -p /opt/Domain-Package; apt-get update -qq; apt-get install -y -qq wget unzip apt-transport-https; if ! command -v pwsh >/dev/null 2>&1; then wget -q https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/24.04/packages-microsoft-prod.deb -O /tmp/packages-microsoft-prod.deb; dpkg -i /tmp/packages-microsoft-prod.deb; rm -f /tmp/packages-microsoft-prod.deb; apt-get update -qq; apt-get install -y -qq powershell; fi; echo Waiting for DNS resolution of {0} - member DNS is the DC, which may still be promoting...; dns=0; for i in \$(seq 1 60); do if getent hosts {1} >/dev/null 2>&1; then dns=1; break; fi; sleep 30; done; if [ \$dns -ne 1 ]; then echo DNS resolution failed; exit 1; fi; dl=0; for i in \$(seq 1 10); do if wget -q \"{2}\" -O /opt/Domain-Package.zip; then dl=1; break; fi; sleep 30; done; if [ \$dl -ne 1 ]; then echo Package download failed; exit 1; fi; unzip -o /opt/Domain-Package.zip -d /opt/Domain-Package; rm -f /opt/Domain-Package.zip; if [ -f /opt/Domain-Package/DSC/Scripts/Set-ConfigCredential.ps1 ]; then echo Injecting credential into Config.json...; pwsh -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -File /opt/Domain-Package/DSC/Scripts/Set-ConfigCredential.ps1 -PasswordBase64 \"{3}\"; fi; echo Starting Deploy-Driver.ps1 - DSC + imperative...; if [ -f /opt/Domain-Package/DSC/Deploy-Driver.ps1 ]; then cd /opt/Domain-Package/DSC; pwsh -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -File /opt/Domain-Package/DSC/Deploy-Driver.ps1 -WorkingPath /opt/Domain-Package; else echo Deploy-Driver.ps1 not found, skipping configuration; fi; echo Driver configuration completed"', variables('packageHost'), variables('packageHost'), parameters('domainPackageZipUrl'), base64(parameters('adminPassword')))]

[format('powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -Command "Set-ExecutionPolicy -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -Force; Start-Transcript -Path C:\domain-sut-setup.log -Append; Write-Output \"Starting Domain SUT Setup...\"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path C:\Domain-Package -Force; Write-Output \"Waiting for DNS resolution of {0} (member DNS is the DC, which may still be promoting)...\"; $dns = $false; for ($i = 0; $i -lt 60; $i++) {{ try {{ Resolve-DnsName -Name \"{1}\" -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; $dns = $true; break }} catch {{ Start-Sleep -Seconds 30 }} }}; if (-not $dns) {{ Write-Output \"DNS resolution of {2} failed after retries\"; exit 1 }}; $zip = \"C:\Domain-Package.zip\"; $dl = $false; for ($i = 0; $i -lt 10; $i++) {{ try {{ Start-BitsTransfer -Source \"{3}\" -Destination $zip -ErrorAction Stop; $dl = $true; break }} catch {{ Write-Output \"Download attempt failed: $($_.Exception.Message)\"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 30 }} }}; if (-not $dl) {{ Write-Output \"Package download failed\"; exit 1 }}; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath C:\Domain-Package -Force; Remove-Item $zip -Force; Write-Output \"Injecting credential into Config.json...\"; if (Test-Path C:\Domain-Package\DSC\Scripts\Set-ConfigCredential.ps1) {{ & C:\Domain-Package\DSC\Scripts\Set-ConfigCredential.ps1 -PasswordBase64 \"{4}\"; }}; Write-Output \"Starting Deploy-SUT.ps1 (DSC + imperative)...\"; if (Test-Path C:\Domain-Package\DSC\Deploy-SUT.ps1) {{ Set-Location C:\Domain-Package\DSC; .\Deploy-SUT.ps1 -WorkingPath C:\Domain-Package; }} else {{ Write-Output \"Deploy-SUT.ps1 not found, skipping configuration\"; }}; Write-Output \"SUT configuration completed\"; Stop-Transcript"', variables('packageHost'), variables('packageHost'), variables('packageHost'), parameters('domainPackageZipUrl'), base64(parameters('adminPassword')))]
